description_long: This chair features a minimalist, modern design with a rectangular seat and a straight, horizontal backrest. The seat and backrest surfaces are finished in a deep black color, contrasting with the light wood frame. The chair has four straight legs, each made from the same light wood as the frame, providing a sturdy and stable base. The backrest is set at a right angle to the seat and is supported by two vertical wooden posts. There are no armrests, giving the chair a clean and open appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both public and private urban spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist chair with a black seat and backrest, supported by a light wood frame and four straight legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black seat and backrest framed by light wood, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's depth, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest's full width and the alignment of the rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the chair's profile and the open space beneath the seat.
